answer.notes: 23-entity definition: 1 INSERT of block X-평면도(기본형)$0$국기계양대 (flagpole), 20 LINE, 2 WIPEOUT (masking), all but the flagpole INSERT on layer 0. The LINEs form a closed double-rectangle outline with a small gap/opening near y=22.5 on both sides — geometrically resembles a plan-view plinth/base enclosure around the flagpole rather than a building wall. Classified as a site-fixture symbol (flagpole + base detail); wall_likelihood reflects the double-line rectangular geometry, not an actual load-bearing wall. WIPEOUT and INSERT entities excluded from wall_line_handles.
